title: Maniac Cop
review: One of those slashers where you know how every scene will end, if it starts with someone minding their own business alone. It doesn't do anything to shock or excite you once you understand what the titular cop is capable of, and you learn that right at the start. It's one of the better low-budget B movies, but compared to something like a {Friday the 13th} it's missing the exciting boss fight ending. Strangely, they barely use Robert Z'Dar's notable chin, because his identity is hidden for most of the movie.
